lines.name: Description
lines.value:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ Court of the Archon
■ Incubi
■ Kabalite Warriors

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1. While that unit is Empowered, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, you can re-roll the Wound roll instead

lines.name: Description
lines.value: If this model is your Warlord, each time your opponent targets a unit from their army with a Stratagem, if that unit is within 12" of this model, increase the cost of that use of that Stratagem by 1CP.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: An Archon has an Invulnerable Save of 2+. You cannot re-roll invulnerable saving throws made for this model. The first time an invulnerable saving throw made for this model is failed, until the end of the battle, this model has no invulnerable saving throw.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this unit contains a Beastmaster model, you can re-roll Charge rolls made for this unit, and each time a BEAST model in this unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This unit has a 6+ Invulnerable save

lines.name: Range
lines.value: Melee

lines.name: Keywords
lines.value: Anti-Infantry 2+

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this unit contains one or more Lhamaean models, weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

lines.name: Keywords
lines.value: Anti-Infantry 3+, Assault

lines.name: Keywords
lines.value: Anti-Infantry 3+, Assault, Pistol

lines.name: Range
lines.value: Melee

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this unit contains one or more Sslyth models, each time an attack targets this unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll

lines.name: A
lines.value: D6

lines.name: BS
lines.value: N/A

lines.name: Keywords
lines.value: Pistol, Torrent

lines.name: Range
lines.value: Melee

lines.name: Description
lines.value: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, if any of those attacks made with its eyeburst scored a hit against an enemy Infantry unit, that Infantry unit must take a Battle-shock test.

lines.name: Range
lines.value: Melee

lines.name: Keywords
lines.value: Sustained Hits 1

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this unit contains one or more Ur-ghul models, this unit has the Fights First ability

lines.name: Description
lines.value: In the Declare Battle Formations step, this unit can join one Kabalite Warriors unit from your army that is being led by an Archon (a Kabalite Warriors unit cannot have more than one Court of the Archon unit joined to it). If it does, until the end of the battle, every model in this unit counts as part of that Kabalite Warriors unit, and its Starting Strength is increased accordingly

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This unit has a 5+ Invulnerable save

lines.name: A
lines.value: D6

lines.name: BS
lines.value: N/A

lines.name: Keywords
lines.value: Ignores Cover, Torrent

lines.name: A
lines.value: D6

lines.name: Keywords
lines.value: Blast, Ignores Cover

lines.name: Range
lines.value: Melee

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time a Pain token is removed from your Pain token pool to Empower a unit, if that Empowered unit is within 9" of this unit, roll one D6: on a 4+, you gain 1 Pain token

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This unit has a 6+ Invulnerable save

lines.name: Range
lines.value: Melee

lines.name: Keywords
lines.value: Twin-Linked

lines.name: Range
lines.value: Melee

lines.name: Keywords
lines.value: Devastating Wounds

lines.name: Description
lines.value:
This model can be attached to the following unit:
■ Incubi

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This unit has a 4+ invulnerable save.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, add 1 to the Wound roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Once per battle, when this model’s unit is selected to fight, it can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by this model have the [PRECISION] ability, and each time an enemy Character model is destroyed by this model, you gain D3 Pain tokens. If that destroyed Character model was the enemy Warlord, you gain 3 Pain tokens instead.

lines.name: A
lines.value: D6

lines.name: BS
lines.value: N/A

lines.name: Keywords
lines.value: Torrent

lines.name: Range
lines.value: Melee

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time a model in this unit is destroyed by a melee attack, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6. On a 4+, do not remove it from play; that destroyed model can fight after the attacking model’s unit has finished making its attacks, and it is then removed from play.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This unit has a 6+ Invulnerable save

lines.name: Description
lines.value:
This model can be attached to the following unit:
■ Wracks

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This unit has a 6+ Invulnerable save

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While an enemy unit is within 6" of this model, each time a Battle-shock or Leadership test is taken for that enemy unit, subtract 1 from that test.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This unit has a 6+ Invulnerable save

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This unit has a 5+ Invulnerable save

lines.name: Description
lines.value: At the start of the Fight phase, each enemy unit within Engagement Range of one or more units with this ability must take a Battle-shock test.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This unit has a 6+ Invulnerable save

lines.name: Description
lines.value: If you control an objective marker at the end of your Command phase, and this unit (or any Transport it is embarked within) is within range of that objective marker, that objective marker remains under you control, even if you have no models within range of it, until your opponent controls it at the start or end of any turn.

lines.name: Range
lines.value: Melee

lines.name: Keywords
lines.value: Anti-Infantry 2+, Sustained Hits 2

lines.name: Description
lines.value:
This model can be attached to the following unit:
■ Wyches

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Fights First ability, and each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, add 1 to the Strength characteristic of that attack and improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Once per battle, at the start of the Fight phase, this model can use this ability. When it does, until the end of the phase, the Attacks characteristic of Lelith’s blades is increased to 12 and this model’s invulnerable save is increased to 3+.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This unit has a 4+ Invulnerable save

lines.name: Description
lines.value: At the end of your opponent’s turn, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove this unit from the battlefield. In the Reinforcements step of your next Movement phase, set it up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 9" horizontally away from all enemy models. If the battle ends and this unit is not on the battlefield, it is destroyed

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This unit has a 5+ invulnerable save.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This unit has a 6+ Invulnerable save

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this model Advances, do not make an Advance roll for it. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of this model.

lines.name: Capacity
lines.value: This model has a transport capacity of 11 Drukhari Infantry models. Each Grotesque model takes up the space of 3 models. This model cannot transport models that can Fly

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This unit has a 6+ Invulnerable save

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this model makes an attack that targets an enemy unit that is at its Starting Strength, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If a unit has a Starting Strength of 1, this ability only applies if the target has its starting number of wounds

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This unit has a 6+ Invulnerable save

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets an enemy unit (excluding units that can Fly), add 1 to the Hit roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This unit has a 6+ invulnerable save.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this unit ends a Normal move, you can select one enemy unit (excluding Monster and Vehicle units) that it moved over during that move. If you do, roll one D6 for each model in this unit: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This unit has a 5+ Invulnerable save

lines.name: Description
lines.value: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, if it is not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to 6". If it does, until the end of the turn, this unit is not eligible to declare a charge

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This unit has a 4+ Invulnerable save

lines.name: Description
lines.value: If this model is Empowered in the Fight phase, then until the end of the phase, models in this model’s unit, have the Fights First ability.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model is leading a unit, melee weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

lines.name: Description
lines.value:
This model can be attached to the following unit:
■ Wyches

lines.name: Description
lines.value: If this unit destroys an enemy unit, until the end of the battle, it is Empowered.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This unit has a 6+ Invulnerable save

lines.name: Range
lines.value: Melee

lines.name: D
lines.value: D3

lines.name: Keywords
lines.value: Anti-Infantry 2+, Precision

lines.name: BS
lines.value: N/A

lines.name: Keywords
lines.value: Devastating Wounds, One Shot, Torrent

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This unit has a 4+ Invulnerable save

lines.name: Description
lines.value:
This model can be attached to the following unit:
■ Wracks

lines.name: Description
lines.value: At the end of your Movement phase, this model can heal one friendly Cronos, Talos, Grotesques or Wracks unit within 6". If it does, one model in that unit regains up to 3 lost wounds (if you selected a Wracks unit, up to 3 destroyed models are returned to that unit instead).

lines.name: Description
lines.value: The first time this model is destroyed, roll one D6 at the end of the phase. On a 2+, set this model back up on the battlefield, as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, with its full wounds remaining

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This unit has a 6+ Invulnerable save

lines.name: Description
lines.value: At the end of the Fight phase, if there are no models currently embarked within this Transport, you can select one friendly Drukhari Infantry unit that has 6 or fewer models that is wholly within 6" of this Transport (you cannot select a Grotesques unit or a unit that can Fly). Unless that unit is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can embark within this Transport.

lines.name: Capacity
lines.value:
This model has a transport capacity of 6 Drukhari Infantry models. This model cannot transport Grotesque models or models that can Fly. 


Before the battle, at the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, you can select one Kabalite Warriors or Wyches unit from your army. If you do, that unit is split into two units, each containing as equal a number of models as possible (when splitting a unit in this way, make a note of which models form each of the two new units). One of these units must start the battle embarked within this Transport; the other can start the battle embarked within another Transport, or it can be deployed as a separate unit.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This unit has a 6+ Invulnerable save

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Once per battle, after this unit ends a Normal move, you can select one enemy model it moved over during that move and roll one D6 for each enemy unit within D6" of that enemy model: on a 4+, that enemy unit suffers D6 mortal wounds.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this unit destroys an enemy unit, you gain 1 Pain token. When this unit is destroyed, you gain 1 Pain token.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This unit has a 6+ Invulnerable save

lines.name: Description
lines.value:
This unit has a 6+ Invulnerable save, The invulnerable save that models in this unit have is
improved to a 4+ against melee attacks.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time an enemy unit (excluding Monsters and Vehicles) within Engagement Range of one or more units from your army with this ability is selected to Fall Back, models in that enemy unit must take Desperate Escape tests as if their unit was Battle-shocked. When doing so, if that enemy unit is also Battle-shocked by other means, subtract 1 from each of those Desperate Escape tests.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This unit has a 5+ Invulnerable save

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model has 1-6 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this model ends a Charge move, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of it and roll one D6: on a 2-3, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 4-5, that enemy unit suffers 3 mortal wounds; on a 6, that enemy unit suffers D3+3 mortal wounds.

lines.name: Capacity
lines.value: This model has a transport capacity of 16 Drukhari Infantry models. Each Grotesque model takes up the space of 3 models. This model cannot transport models that can Fly.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If the target of that attack is an enemy unit within range of an objective marker, you can re-roll the Hit roll instead.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: At the start of the battle, select one unit from your opponent’s army. Each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets that unit, that attack has the [LETHAL HITS] and [PRECISION] abilities.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit (excluding Monsters and Vehicles) hit by one or more of those attacks. That enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test. If one or more of those attacks destroyed a model in that enemy unit, subtract 1 from that test.

lines.name: Description
lines.value:
In your Shooting phase, each time this model is selected to shoot, select one of the abilities below. Until the end of the phase, this model’s Shrieker Cannon has that ability:
■ [IGNORES COVER]
■ [PRECISION]
■ [SUSTAINED HITS 3]

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This unit has a 4+ Invulnerable save

lines.name: Range
lines.value: Melee

lines.name: Keywords
lines.value: Precision

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This unit has a 4+ Invulnerable save

lines.name: Description
lines.value:
Once per battle, in your Movement phase, before this model makes a Normal move it can use this ability. If it does, until the end of
the turn, add 2D6" to this model’s Move characteristic and add 3 to the
Attacks characteristic of this model’s Solitaire weapons.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This model is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

lines.name: Description
lines.value:
This model can be attached to the following unit:
■ Troupe

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This unit has a 4+ Invulnerable save

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model is leading a unit, that unit can only be selected as the target of a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 18".

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Melee weapons equipped by enemy models have the [Hazardous] ability while targeting this model's unit.

lines.name: Range
lines.value: Melee

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This unit has a 4+ Invulnerable save

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time an attack targets this unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This unit has a 4+ Invulnerable save

lines.name: Description
lines.value: At the end of the Fight phase, if there are no models currently embarked within this Transport, you can select one friendly Harlequins Infantry unit that has 6 or fewer models that is wholly within 6" of this Transport. Unless that unit is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can embark within this Transport.

lines.name: Capacity
lines.value: This model has a transport capacity of 6 Harlequins Infantry models.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This unit has a 4+ Invulnerable save

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This unit can only be selected as the target of a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 18".

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This unit has a 4+ Invulnerable save

lines.name: Description
lines.value:
At the start of the Fight phase, select one of the following abilities for this unit to gain until the end of the phase:
■ Hero's Prowess: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.
■ Villain's Doom: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Wound roll.
■ Trickster's Grace: Each time an attack targets this unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This unit has a 4+ Invulnerable save

lines.name: Description
lines.value:
This model can be attached to the following unit:
■ Troupe

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes a Pile In or Consolidate move, it can move up to 6" instead of 3". In addition, it does not need to end that move closer to the closest enemy model, provided it ends as close as possible to the closest enemy unit.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this model makes a melee attack you can re-roll a Hit roll of 1 and add 1 to the Wound roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This model has a 6+ invulnerable save.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this model makes an attack that targets an enemy unit that is at its Starting Strength, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If the target unit has a Starting Strength of 1, this ability only applies if that unit has its starting number of wounds.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This model has a 5+ invulnerable save.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets a unit that cannot FLY, add 1 to the Hit roll.

lines.name: Range
lines.value: Melee

lines.name: Description
lines.value: You can target this unit with the Heroic Intervention Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already used that Stratagem on a different unit this phase.

lines.name: Range
lines.value: Melee

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Once per turn, when an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move within 9" of this unit, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to D6".

lines.name: Description
lines.value: If a model from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to a ^^Corsair Voidreavers^^ unit, it can be attached to this unit instead.

lines.name: Range
lines.value: Melee

lines.name: Description
lines.value: At the end of your opponent’s turn, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove this unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.
